name: Delay (Tape)
description: This algorithm is based on the disting mk4 algorithm D-2 Tape Delay, which is itself a simplified version of the Augustus Loop effect. It is a delay/echo effect which simulates a variable speed tape loop echo device.
gui_description: Tape delay effect interface with tape length and speed controls

parameters.name: Mix mode
parameters.description: Sets how the delay and dry signals are mixed. See above.

parameters.name: Mix
parameters.description: Controls the wet/dry mix, unless the Mix mode is With feedback.

parameters.name: Tape length
parameters.description: Sets the length of the tape i.e. the delay time at 1x speed.

parameters.name: Tape speed
parameters.description: Sets the tape speed (in conjunction with the CV input).

input_ports.name: Speed input
input_ports.description: The tape speed CV input bus.
